body.title: D-twm-hygiene-2026-04-23
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-twm-hygiene-2026-04-23

**Closed at:** 2026-04-23T22:13:54.258998+00:00
**Ticket count:** 4 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-twm-self-eviction-policy (S) — TWM self-eviction — decide policy when newly-inserted row loses to all existing rows  `done` — retired: superseded by T-twm-salience-time-decay. SELF_EVICTED WARNING already shipped in 088c9bf5 (observability unblocked). No fold-in needed — with time-decay, old rows naturally lose eviction rank
- T-twm-sleep-eviction (M) — TWM sleep — background process evicts stale unintegrated observations  `done` — retired: superseded by T-twm-salience-time-decay + T-twm-leap-on-lever. No fold-in needed — decay demotes stale rows in eviction ranking; leap re-surfaces latent items when associatively relevant; nar
- T-twm-salience-time-decay (S) — TWM salience decays with time — even big topics fade to background  `done` — Shipped in 235114c0. Effective salience at eviction = stored * 0.5^(age/halflife); halflife env-tunable via IGOR_TWM_SALIENCE_HALFLIFE_SEC (default 7200s). Added 3 pure helpers (_twm_decay_factor + _t
- T-twm-leap-on-lever (M) — TWM leap-on-lever — new observations boost latent items via associative sweep  `done` — Shipped in 47a2728e. New module wild_igor/igor/memory/twm_leap.py with leap_sweep() primitive — word-graph spread from new obs content, then score summed activation against each latent TWM row's token

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: unknown.
